summary: Medical Records Management app with private per-user access (secured via Internet Identity), PDF/image upload and in-app viewing, delete records, search/filter by date and name, and automatic data extraction of key info from uploaded documents.
architectural_notes: Each user's records are private and scoped to their Internet Identity principal
Supports PDF and image file uploads with in-app rendering

existing_features.title: Add a dedicated 'Records' section/page where authenticated users can see all their uploaded PDFs and images. Each record entry should display a thumbnail or file-type icon, the file name, upload date, and extracted metadata (e.g., patient name, record date). The list must be private — each user only sees their own files.

Enable in-app viewing of uploaded PDFs and images. Clicking a record should open the file in a modal or dedicated viewer — PDFs rendered in an embedded PDF viewer (e.g., using an iframe or object tag with the blob URL) and images displayed in a lightbox-style modal.

Add a delete action to each record in the Records page. A delete button on each record entry should prompt for confirmation before permanently removing both the file blob and its metadata from the backend.

Add search and filter controls to the Records page. Users should be able to search records by file name or extracted patient name, and filter by date range (from/to date pickers). Results should update reactively as the user types or changes filters.

Automatically extract key information from uploaded PDFs and images upon upload. At minimum, attempt to extract: record date and patient name using the existing OCR extraction utility (ocrExtraction.ts). Display extracted fields alongside the file in the Records list and allow the user to review/edit them before saving.

new_feature_requests.summary: Upload and store medical PDFs and images
Private per-user access secured via Internet Identity
View uploaded PDFs and images in-app
Search and filter records by name and date
Auto data extraction of key info (date, patient name) from uploaded documents

Store uploaded PDF and image file blobs in the backend per user. Each stored record should track: the file blob (Blob), MIME type, original file name, upload timestamp, and the user's principal as the owner. Retrieval must be scoped to the calling user's principal.
